author: machdragon
name: LAWA + KURE/R2 + Tanh Reparam + LoRA TTT
blurb: Validated Modal 8xH100 run of the LAWA parallel-EMA + KURE/R2 quantization-regularized + tanh-reparameterized int6 recipe with optional causal LoRA TTT. The stable result for this configuration is the final sliding-window int6 exact metric; LoRA TTT regressed badly on this run and should remain a research toggle, not the default scoring path.
notes: Canonical validated run_id=kure-r2-ttt-001 on Modal 8xH100. LAWA selected decay=0.995. Final plain int6 roundtrip exact was val_bpb=1.22367515; sliding-window exact is the representative score for this recipe because EVAL_STRIDE=64 in the record script.
